name: Suspicious WebDav Client Execution
notes:
This rule detects exfiltration attempts or use of WebDav to launch code hosted on a WebDav Server.

Covered from SIGMA Rule.

Original Author: Roberto Rodriguez (Cyb3rWard0g), OTR (Open Threat Research)
SIGMA Title: WebDav Client Execution
SIGMA Description: Detects "svchost.exe" spawning "rundll32.exe" with command arguments like C:\windows\system32\davclnt.dll,DavSetCookie. This could be an indicator of exfiltration or use of WebDav to launch code (hosted on WebDav Server).


Confidence: MEDIUM

This rule may be covered under the Detection Rule License: https://ibm.biz/SigmaDetectionRuleLicense
conditions_text: when the event(s) were detected by one or more of Microsoft Windows Security Event Log
when the event category for the event is one of the following System.Process Creation Success
when the event matches LOWER("Process Full Full Name") MATCHES 'rundll32\.exe' AQL filter query
when the event matches Command (custom) contains all of [davclnt.dll or DavSetCookie]
TD_list: APPLY Suspicious WebDav Client Execution on events which are detected by the LOCAL system
AND when the event(s) were detected by one or more of Microsoft Windows Security Event Log
AND when the event category for the event is one of the following System.Process Creation Success
AND when the event matches LOWER("Process Full Full Name") MATCHES 'rundll32\.exe' AQL filter query
AND when the event matches Command (custom) contains all of [davclnt.dll or DavSetCookie]
RED_list: Event name: Suspicious WebDav Client Execution
Event description: Detects exfiltration attempts or use of WebDav to launch code hosted on a WebDav Server.
Force the dispatched event to create a NEW offense, select the offense using Source IP
This information should contribute to the name of the associated offense(s)
